series_metadata.series_title: MI-39 Custom Slaughter and Processing Records
series_metadata.series_description: All custom animals for slaughter and all custom carcasses or parts for processing that do not bear the official State of Ohio or the official USDA mark of inspection must be identified at all times and must be stamped "NOT FOR SALE". The information described on this form must be maintained in a current status and kept on file at the extablishment.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Keep in plant files from issue date
